requirement_topic.en: Electrical safety, ST CoA, and MS IEC 62841 mapping
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全、ST CoA与MS IEC 62841映射
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全、ST CoA與MS IEC 62841映射

summary.en: Malaysia controls in-scope power tools through ST destination pathways that rely on a Malaysian Certificate of Approval process handled with SIRIM QAS as the ST-designated conformity body. Corded and cordless tools in scope require a Malaysia-facing electrical-safety file mapped to MS IEC 62841 where product risk class and category fit, plus importer-linked responsibility and CoA linkage. The Malaysia file must cover model-by-model scope, nameplate values, and the local declaration logic expected before release.
summary.zh: 马来西亚对受管制电动工具采用以ST目的地路径为主的控制，SIRIM QAS作为ST指定合格评定机构处理CoA。受控范围内的有线和无绳工具需要基于MS IEC 62841的马来西亚导向电气安全文件，并与在地进口商责任和CoA衔接绑定。马来西亚文件需按机型覆盖范围、铭牌参数和放行前的本地声明逻辑。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞對受監管電動工具採用以ST目的地路徑為主的控制，SIRIM QAS作為ST指定合格評定機構處理CoA。受控範圍內的有線和無繩工具需要基於MS IEC 62841的馬來西亞導向電氣安全文件，並與在地進口商責任和CoA銜接綁定。馬來西亞文件需按機型覆蓋範圍、銘牌參數和放行前的本地聲明邏輯。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) and ST destination controls for regulated electrical products
Electrical Supply Act 1990 destination implementation with ST CoA process
MS IEC 62841 and related MS/IEC electrical safety standards adopted under Malaysia practice
SIRIM QAS International CoA and importer responsibility framework

summary.en: China uses GB 3883 and related GB/T test and inspection routes for power-tool electrical safety, and applies CCC where mandatory. Chinese evidence can support technical review but does not close ST-SIRIM destination proof without Malaysia-specific CoA mapping.
summary.zh: 中国使用GB 3883及相关GB/T路径进行电动工具电气安全测试和验收，CCC在适用范围内执行。中国证据可作为技术评估输入，但未经过马来西亚目的地CoA映射前不能替代ST-SIRIM目的地证明。
summary.zht: 中國使用GB 3883及相關GB/T路徑進行電動工具電氣安全測試和驗收，CCC在適用範圍內執行。中國證據可作為技術評估輸入，但未經過馬來西亞目的地CoA映射前不能取代ST-SIRIM目的地證明。

standards_or_laws: China CCC where mandatory for in-scope electrical products

gap.en: The gap is mainly process and scope mapping. Export files often stop at GB/CCC outputs, but Malaysia needs in-market CoA evidence aligned by model family, import channel, and local importer ownership, even when 240 V and 50 Hz issues are not technical design changes.
gap.zh: 差距主要在于流程和范围映射。中国文件常停留在GB/CCC输出层级，而马来西亚需要以机型族群、入境口岸和本地进口方责任为前提的目的地CoA证据，即便240V和50Hz问题不一定触发重新设计。
gap.zht: 差距主要在流程和範圍映射。中國文件常停留在GB/CCC輸出層級，而馬來西亞需要以機型族群、入境口岸和本地進口方責任為前提的目的地CoA證據，即便240V與50Hz問題不一定觸發重新設計。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the tool falls under ST regulated-product scope. ST CoA linked to a Malaysia resident importer and MS IEC 62841-based destination evidence is mandatory for release to the market; GB/T outputs are not substitutes.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where the same category is in the China mandatory scope with GB and CCC obligations. Mandatory Chinese certifications are not automatically destination complete for Malaysia.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Malaysia-ready until ST destination electrical evidence is mapped to CoA scope, importer ownership, and Malaysia release files rather than relying on GB/CCC outputs alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在未将中国GB/CCC证据映射为ST受管范围、进口方责任和马来西亚放行文件前，不能视为马来西亚就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在未將中國GB/CCC證據映射為ST受管範圍、進口方責任和馬來西亞放行文件前，不能視為馬來西亞就緒。
